description_long: This is a medium-sized domestic cat with a sleek, muscular build and a short, dense coat. Its fur is predominantly gray with subtle tabby striping and faint lighter underbelly markings. The cat is sitting upright with its head tilted upward, ears perked, and eyes appearing alert and focused. Its front legs are straight and close together, while the hind legs are tucked under the body, and the tail extends straight out behind. The facial features are sharp, with a defined nose and attentive expression. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, agile cat, likely accustomed to urban environments.
description: A gray tabby cat with a sleek build, sitting upright and looking alert with its tail extended straight out. Its short, striped fur and attentive posture give it a lively, urban-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cat sitting upright with its head tilted up and tail extended behind.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cat's alert face, straight front legs, and symmetrical body posture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the upright sitting posture and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back, hind legs, and the tail extending straight out from the body.
attribute_fur_pattern: tabby, gray with subtle stripes and lighter underbelly
